title: Untitled Note
content:
# Welcome to Aura Notes

Aura Notes is a luxurious, minimalist, enterprise-grade note-taking workspace designed for professionals who appreciate simplicity, design, and intelligent assistance.

### Core Features:
- **Clean Layout**: Sidebars, real-time searchable list, and beautiful editor area.
- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Work faster with native commands.
- **Aesthetic Pairings**: Styled with the Inter & JetBrains Mono font faces, frosted glass layers, and micro-animations.
- **Embedded Table Component**: Insert and edit rich tabular data within notes.
- **Interactive AI Assistant**: Summarize, translate, rewrite, extract action items, and chat directly in context.

*Aura is offline-first and automatically synchronized with the server.*

title: 🚀 Aura Enterprise Launch Plan
content:
# Aura Enterprise Launch Plan

This note outlines the critical tasks and timeline for launching the premium enterprise productivity package.

### Key Pillars:
1. **Design Execution**: High contrast visual hierarchy, fluid animations, and dark/light modes.
2. **AI Layer**: Instant contextual shortcuts (Action Items, Summarisation, Translations).
3. **Scalability**: High-performance UI with multi-view toggles and responsive grid analytics.

### Progress Checklist:
- [x] Design visual components (frosted glass card style)
- [x] Implement the AI Assistant panel
- [ ] Deploy Cloud Run container
- [ ] Configure custom domains

### Project Metrics:
| Phase | Goal | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Phase 1 | UI/UX Complete | Done |
| Phase 2 | Gemini Backend | Active |
| Phase 3 | Enterprise Scale | Upcoming |

*Target Launch Date: Q3-2026*

title: 📅 Q3 Strategy & OKR Sync
content:
# Q3 Strategy & OKR Sync

**Date**: July 5, 2026
**Attendees**: Sarah, Marcus, David, Elena

### Objectives Covered:
- Standardize enterprise security capabilities.
- Refine user onboarding flow to reduce drop-off rate by 15%.
- Optimize real-time data sync latency.

### Discussion Points:
Elena presented the latest telemetry reports. Design-centric changes have shown a 24% increase in daily active user duration. David suggested adding auto-save status and clear reading indicators.

### Key Decisions:
- Approved shift towards premium Inter font hierarchy.
- Standardized large rounded borders (16-24px) for cards.
- Agreed on using Gemini 3.5 Flash for the in-context AI panel.

*Action items will be extracted automatically using the AI Panel on the right!*

title: Express Server refactoring specs
content:
# Express Server Refactoring Spec

**Objective**: Restructure the Node container server endpoints to safely isolate workspace contexts and optimize disk load pipelines.

### 🛠️ Action Items:
- [ ] Migrate `notes-db.json` into structural workspace volumes
- [ ] Implement token authorization middlewares
- [ ] Add Gzip compress filters to static client static trees
